discussion_comments.comment_body: The callee returned a possible error, but the caller did not handle it
The callee returned a possible error, but the caller did not handle it
assert(0) to terminate program in library code is not acceptable, return error code and let the caller to handle it
return -1 to indicate invalid impl_type value error

- 这地方是不是得 || 而不是 &&
- shape 总是 pack1 的，而 in 可能是任意 pack，要考虑有 pack 的情形
- shape 中可能存在 w h d c <=0 的情形，表示动态，要考虑这种情形

const Mat in_shape = in.shape();
and then compare dims w h d c ...
